data.title: Tool usage breakdown available
data.description: 38403 hook events captured. Top tools: Bash (14901), Read (9582), Edit (3897).
data.suggested_fix: Review tool usage patterns. High Edit/Write ratios may indicate files needing refactoring.

data.title: Pi CLI flag fixes: --skill, --theme path, journal footer
data.summary: Fixed three issues in jfl pi command: (1) --skills→--skill typo caused skills path to be sent as initial prompt to agent, triggering 'already processing' error and dumping all 22 skills as response; (2) --theme 'jfl' resolved to nonexistent path, added findPiTheme() to resolve actual jfl.theme.json path; (3) moved journal nudge from aboveEditor widget to setStatus footer for less intrusive UX.

data.title: Full Pi TUI upgrade: footer, tool renderers, overlays, shortcuts, notifications, bookmarks
data.summary: Massive UX/DX upgrade to @jfl/pi leveraging Pi's full TUI capabilities. Added custom footer with live telemetry, themed renderCall/renderResult for all 11 JFL tools, keyboard shortcuts with floating overlays, native terminal notifications, session bookmarks, and expanded PiContext shim exposing full Pi API.
